questions.text:
I really enjoy shopping at Covent Garden Market. It's very __________ because it isn't far from where I live.

  1. expensive
  2. crowded
  3. convenient
  4. traditional

I love it because it has a ____________. It’s very lively, with musicians and street performers.

  1. quiet space
  2. great atmosphere
  3. modern design
  4. small size

The prices are great. I usually find designer shoes at very ___________ prices.

  1. high
  2. cheap
  3. reasonable
  4. fixed

This shop has an __________ of products. You can find almost anything you need there.

  1. limited choice
  2. amazing selection
  3. high price
  4. small number

The café is a bit __________, so not many people know about it.

  1. in the centre
  2. easy to find
  3. out of the way
  4. very popular
